title: gomphia coccinea
intro: Gomphia coccinea, a plant species native to tropical Africa, is a shrub or small tree belonging to the family Ebenaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Gomphia coccinea include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for consumption, or used in traditional medicine in the form of extracts or tinctures.
